caption: A man with a goatee and glasses, wearing a white button-down shirt and a gold watch, sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing. He wears a large, grey, upright faux-hair piece on his head. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. In the background, a mannequin wears a white shirt, and several framed pictures hang on the wall. On-screen text on the left side of the scene reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" next to a microphone icon, and similar text appears on the right. The man is captured in a sequence of movements where he holds his hands up to the sides of the grey hair piece, adjusting it or holding it in place while speaking and glancing slightly to the side. The background and equipment remain static as the man's hands and facial expression shift slightly across the sequence.
